name: Blondie Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 minutes Bake Time:
27 to 30 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease an 8x8x2 inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco. Set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, melt the Butter Flavor Crisco over low heat. Add milk and stir until the Crisco has melted. Remove from heat and stir in brown sugar. Add egg and stir until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the sugar mixture, stirring constantly. Stir in vanilla extract and chopped walnuts. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 27 to 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into 2x2 inch squares.
Makes 16 squares.
